abilities.name: Demise (To the Sky)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, an ally within 6" may place anywhere within 4" of itself.

abilities.name: Horizon's Call
abilities.text: If this model has a Shielded token, it may ignore terrain and other models while moving.

actions.name: Reckless Momentum
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Chart a Course
triggers.text: Move this model up to 2" for each (r) in this action's final duel total (to a maximum of 6").

triggers.name: Strong Winds
triggers.text: Move the target 2" for every (m) in this action's final duel total.

actions.name: Wake Rider
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: This model is moved 3", then move the target up to 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Buried in the Sand
triggers.text: Remove a marker within 1" of this model.

actions.name: Onward
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may declare the Walk action.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.
